title: Find My Device - Don't Allow - Cancel [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Test the "Don't Allow" and "Cancel" flow in Find My Device when location permission is denied and then cancelled, verifying the permission prompt reappears consistently across multiple attempts and after app restart.
steps: Tap "Don't Allow" on location permission prompt.
expected:
1. After step 3, location permission prompt appears with options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", "Don't Allow".
2. After step 4, permission prompt shows "Cancel" and "Enable Now" with FMD screen visible in background.
3. After step 5, app navigates back to Poly Lens Menu.
4. Steps 6-7 repeat the same behavior as steps 4-5.
5. After step 8, same behavior as step 4.
